detector_implementation_status.methodology: Cross-referenced docs/10-curriculum/misconceptions.md catalog against src/engine/misconceptionRules.ts MISCONCEPTION_RULES table.

MC-EQ-01.notes: Catalog says 'planned — not yet implemented'. Signal: student picks '=' on same-denominator compare when numerators differ by 1, ≥50% of time over 4+ attempts.

MC-EQ-02.notes: Catalog says 'planned — not yet implemented'. Signal: student misplaces ½-equivalent fractions (2/4, 3/6, 4/8) in 'almost_half' zone instead of 'half' zone, ≥50% over 3+ attempts.

implicitlyDetectedNotInCatalog.notes: In MISCONCEPTION_RULES, referenced in level-09.md §8.3 but not in misconceptions.md catalog.

Order.note: WHB-02 in L9 order question (same-numerator ordering)

major_gaps: Whole-number bias (WHB-01: numerator) never appears in curriculum traps — only WHB-02 (denominator) is triggered
All magnitude-blindness misconceptions (MAG-01, MAG-02) have detector rules but no curriculum traps
Proximity misconceptions (PRX-01, PRX-02) have detectors but zero curriculum coverage
Shape-based misconceptions (SHP-01, SHP-02) defined but not used
Denominator-switch and thirds-vs-half misconceptions (L5 specific) untapped

level_coverage.L1–L5: Only EOL-01 (2 questions total); levels 4–5 completely dark
level_coverage.L6–L9: Only WHB-02; deliberate gap for compare/order curriculum focus
